title: Trophies, 6pcs Trophies Medals Set Mini Winner Award Trophies Reward Prizes Plastic Trophy Model Prize Cup Toy Competitions Awards Toy Costume Parties Supplies
features: 【WHAT YOU GET】You will receive 6 pcs of gold award trophy cups, perfect for birthday parties, Christmas gifts, and office surprises. These lifelike and textured mini trophy cups are sure to impress.

【VERSATILE PARTY FAVOR】These mini trophies are ideal for any occasion. Use them as party favors, classroom rewards, or office gags. Their compact size and eye-catching design make them a hit at any event.

【DIY CUSTOMIZATION】Get creative with these trophies! Personalize each cup with your own name, logo, or adorable patterns to match the theme of your party or event. Let your imagination run wild and make each trophy special.
【PERFECT GIFTS】Make your gold trophy awards extra special by placing candy, chocolate, or cards on top. Create personalized awards for your loved ones or surprise your colleagues with a sweet treat.
【LIGHTWEIGHT & STURDY】Made of high-quality golden plastic, these mini trophy cups are lightweight, sturdy, and long-lasting. They are also easy for kids to hold.
description: Trophy Cup Gold Plastic Trophies and Medals Gold Plastic Winner Medals Specifications: Color：Gold Size: Trophies about 9cm in height Medals diameter approx 6 cm Ribbon length approx 9.5 cm Material: plastic Package includes: 6x Gold Award Trophies Notice: 1: Please keep away from kids under 3 years, play under adult's supervision 2: Please get away from fire
